name: Informatica Intelligent Data Management Cloud API
what_it_does: Informatica Intelligent Data Management Cloud (IDMC) REST API for enterprise data integration and master data management platform. Enables AI agents to manage data integration pipelines and ETL workflows, handle master data management and golden record creation, access data quality profiling and standardization workflows, retrieve data catalog and lineage tracking, manage cloud data integration across Salesforce, SAP, and cloud data warehouses, handle real-time data streaming and CDC integration, access data governance and policy management, retrieve business glossary and data classification data, manage customer 360 and product MDM profiles, and integrate data management workflows with Snowflake, Databricks, and enterprise data platforms.
use_cases: Managing ETL pipelines and data integration from enterprise data engineering agents
Creating and maintaining golden records from MDM automation agents
Accessing data quality profiling from data governance agents
Integrating Salesforce and SAP data with cloud warehouses from enterprise data agents
not_for: Small business data integration without enterprise-scale MDM requirements
Simple API data sync without complex ETL transformation needs
Open-source data integration without enterprise support requirements
best_when: An enterprise using Informatica IDMC wants AI agents to automate data pipeline management, golden record maintenance, data quality scoring, MDM workflow orchestration, and cross-system data synchronization.
avoid_when: OPERATIONAL RISK: MDM golden record automation can propagate data errors across all connected systems at enterprise scale — data quality validation is critical before golden record promotion. ETL pipeline automation must handle schema evolution and upstream data changes. Data governance policy automation requires business stakeholder review.

auth.notes: Informatica uses OAuth 2.0 for IDMC REST API access. Session-based authentication with username/password for initial token generation. Organization-level credentials with data integration, MDM, and catalog scopes. Comprehensive developer documentation. Webhooks for pipeline and job events. SDKs for Python and Java.

pricing.paid_tiers: IPU (Informatica Processing Unit) consumption model; annual enterprise contracts
pricing.notes: Redwood City, California. Founded 1993. NASDAQ: INFA. Enterprise data management leader. $1.5B+ annual revenue. Used by 5,000+ enterprises including General Electric and Unilever. CLAIRE AI engine for intelligent data management. AWS, Azure, Google Cloud partnerships. Competes with Talend, MuleSoft, and Reltio for enterprise data management.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per organization; IPU consumption tracked

known_agent_gotchas: OPERATIONAL RISK: MDM golden record promotion propagates to all downstream systems — validate data quality before promoting
Session-based auth with token expiry — agent must handle IDMC session token refresh lifecycle
No public MCP server — complex enterprise REST API with extensive documentation
IPU consumption model — automated pipelines consume compute units; monitor IPU budget to avoid unexpected costs
Schema evolution — pipeline automation must detect upstream schema changes and handle gracefully
Enterprise licensing required — no self-serve API access; requires Informatica commercial relationship
agent_readiness.security_notes: Enterprise data management and MDM. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR, HIPAA, FedRAMP. OAuth2. Multi-region. Master data and data governance sensitivity.

security_score_components.security_notes: Enterprise MDM and data integration. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR, HIPAA, FedRAMP. OAuth2. Multi-region. Master data and governance sensitivity.
